title: InSearchOfNames-Book-Writer
description: A simple client side mod that allows you to auto write books
body:
# InSearchOfName's Book Writer Mod

Use the `.write` command to open the Book Writer Menu, which shows a simple where you can enter the title and text of the book you want to port to minecraft.

The mod will automatically split your text across multiple books if it’s too long to fit in one.

## How to Use

Type `.write` in chat to open the menu.

Enter your text in the textboxes.

Click “write to book” and the mod will start writing the book(s) for you automatically.

![Writing books using the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yn4qgdpm/images/d601d10254d470951638ecd816045724664cd7ca.gif)

![Showing the book calculation feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yn4qgdpm/images/2ee098577bbd7c4ac182a5e08ddae4b23c0377b4.gif)
---

## Disclaimer

- Book packets are sent every `3 seconds` (might change this to make it variable for the user) while using the `.write` command.
- Use responsibly: This mod is intended for single-player or multiplayer where use is permitted.
- The author is not responsible for any bans, restrictions, or abuse that may occur from using this mod on servers with rules against automated book creation.
- Always check server rules before using this mod in multiplayer environments.
